blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add deterministic evidence for invoice generation
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the invoice generation from an approved timesheet.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice generation from approved timesheet'. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the process of generating an invoice, but there is no evidence of the actual implementation or validation of this requirement, leading to a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of the actual invoice generation process from an approved timesheet being validated.
